subject: Re: manifesto
body:
think small....planetary network,,,teach millions.... lets find out how a class learns... design experiments,,, can I seee the teacher, can I be asked a question... volume   gender,,, even,, do I learn at a faster rate if taught by someone of similar genes... my guess is a big yes... littlestjeff
